A clear description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'

4. See error

What you expected to happen.

What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment

- **File Size**: [e.g. 50MB ZIP]
